"'''Chief Chirpa Kidnapped!'''" is a short story that appeared in the [[1988]] [[Marvel Comics]] ''[[Ewoks Annual]]''.

{{Shortstory-stub}}

==Plot summary==
As the Ewoks of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] are celebrating their annual [[Halloween/Legends|Hallowe'en]] festival, a dangerous [[hanadak]] enters the [[Happy Grove/Legends|clearing]]. [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket W. Warrick]] rallies the other Ewoks to drive it away with [[Color/Legends|blue]] [[dlock plant]] leaves, which appease the beast and compel it to leave. However, the distractions allow a group of [[Dulok/Legends|Duloks]] to infiltrate the [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Ewok village]] and raid the [[harvest store]]. There they accidentally capture [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]] and bring him back to their [[Dulok Swamp|camp]] with the rest of their booty. Warrick and his friends [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] and [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]] give chase.

At the Duloks' camp, the chief, [[Gorneesh/Legends|Gorneesh]],<ref name="Ewoks Annual">The Dulok chief is not named in the story, being referred to only as the Dulok chief. However, the word-search game "Spot the Names!," on p. 35 of the Marvel ''[[Ewoks Annual]]'', establishes that the chief in question is Gorneesh.</ref> orders the booty opened, revealing an angered Chirpa. The Duloks tie him to a [[baccy tree]], thinking they can ransom him. However, Chirpa's shouting annoys the Duloks and leads to a squabble that leads Kneesaa, Teebo, and Warrick to the camp. Warrick frees Chirpa, who [[Skirmish on Halloween|bests]] the Duloks in a fight and allows the Ewoks to escape.
